title: High Value Customer Retention
message: Hey *valued customer* 👋, we noticed you're from *Delhi* 📍! As a token of appreciation for your ₹18171 spend with us, enjoy *10% off* on your next order 🎁. Use code: DELHI10 at checkout 🛍️
aiReasoning: The audience has a high average spend and is concentrated in a single city, indicating a potential for loyalty and repeat business. A personalized offer and exclusive discount can motivate them to make another purchase, increasing repeat purchases and customer retention.
improvements: Track customer interactions to further personalize the message
